name: pg_savior
abstract: Prevent accidental data loss and risky schema changes
description: A PostgreSQL extension that intercepts dangerous statements before they run. Blocks DELETE/UPDATE without a WHERE clause; DELETE/UPDATE whose planner row estimate exceeds a configurable threshold; CREATE INDEX without CONCURRENTLY; ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN ... DEFAULT and ALTER TABLE ALTER COLUMN TYPE on tables larger than a threshold; TRUNCATE on large tables; DROP TABLE on large tables; and DROP DATABASE. Each guard raises ERROR (aborting the transaction so applications notice) and can be bypassed per-session with pg_savior.bypass = on, or disabled globally with pg_savior.enabled = off.

pg_savior.abstract: Prevent accidental data loss and risky schema changes
